title: FlowHud
description: A customizable HUD mod for Minecraft that adds a variety of useful interface elements with full customization of positions, colors, and settings.
body:
## ✨ Features

### 🎯 Core Features
- **Customizable HUD** - Complete customization of all interface elements
- **Position Editor** - Intuitive graphical editor for element placement
- **Scaling** - Resize all HUD elements
- **Color Scheme** - Configure colors for different states and elements

### 📊 Information Elements
- **FPS Monitor** - Display frames per second in real-time
- **Ping Indicator** - Show connection latency to server
- **TPS Counter** - Server ticks per second for performance monitoring
- **TNT Timer** - Countdown timer for ignited TNT blocks
- **Player Health** - Display other players' HP under their names

### 🎮 Game Elements
- **Armor Indicator** - Durability and equipped armor count
- **Ammo Counter** - Arrow and ammunition count in inventory
- **Mace Indicator** - Charge and mace status for combat usage
- **Potion Effects** - Active effects with remaining duration
- **Item Pickup Log** - History of recently picked up items
- **Layout Grid** - Helper grid for precise element alignment

### ⚙️ Additional Functions
- **Camera Shake Toggle** - Disable screen shake when taking damage
- **Customizable Hotkeys** - Quick access to main mod functions
- **ModMenu Integration** - Easy management through mod menu

## 🎨 Customization

### Element Positioning
Each HUD element can be freely moved around the screen using:
- **Graphical Editor** - Opens with Right Shift key
- **Precise Positioning** - Through settings with numerical values
- **Anchor Points** - For docking elements to screen edges

### Color Scheme
- **Positive Color** - For good values (high health, durability)
- **Negative Color** - For bad values (low health, critical durability)
- **Accent Color** - Main interface color for element highlighting

## ⌨️ Controls

### Hotkeys
- **K** - Toggle camera shake
- **Right Shift** - Open HUD editor

### Settings
All settings accessible through:
- ModMenu (recommended)

## 💡 How It Works

The mod operates by overlaying additional elements on top of Minecraft's standard HUD. Each element renders independently and can be configured separately:

1. **Data Collection** - Mod gathers information from the game (FPS, ping, inventory, etc.)
2. **Processing** - Data is processed and formatted for display
3. **Rendering** - Elements are drawn on screen considering position and color settings
4. **Updates** - All elements update in real-time

### Optimization
- Minimal performance impact
- Smart updates only for changed elements
- Configurable update frequency for different data types

---

## 📄 License

This mod is licensed under MIT License.

---

## 💡 Mod Highlights

✅ **Lightweight** - Minimal performance impact  
✅ **Customizable** - Full control over appearance  
✅ **Modern** - Support for current Minecraft versions  
✅ **User-friendly** - Intuitive interface and editor  
✅ **Multilingual** - Russian and English language support
